name: Signature Facial Edit
description: A polished three-visit programme designed to reset tone, hydration, and brightness with the clinic's most requested facial sequence.
tagline: Radiance reset for skin that needs an immediate lift in clarity.

name: Bridal Glow Suite
description: An extended pre-event journey pairing complexion work with finishing touches so your skin, lashes, and body treatments feel coordinated.
tagline: Our most elevated package for weddings, portraits, and milestone events.
duration: 7 appointments across face, lash, and body
idealFor: Brides, camera-ready prep, multi-week treatment planning

name: Monthly Maintenance Club
description: A four-session facial rhythm created for clients who want their skin kept consistently polished instead of waiting for it to fall out of balance.
tagline: Structured upkeep for skin that performs better on a schedule.
idealFor: Ongoing upkeep, texture management, glow retention

name: Full Body IPL Series
description: A comprehensive eight-session plan covering the high-maintenance zones that benefit most from a disciplined IPL routine.
tagline: A complete body package for smooth, low-maintenance skin.
idealFor: Long-term hair reduction across major areas

name: Lash Lovers Membership
description: A six-session lash package built for clients who prefer continuity, softer upkeep cycles, and a consistently finished look.
tagline: Refined lashes on repeat, without last-minute booking pressure.
idealFor: Frequent lash clients, travel plans, regular maintenance

name: LPG Body Contour Bundle
description: A focused body series pairing contouring work with a smoother, firmer finish for clients who want visible progress over a short block.
tagline: Five sessions designed to refine tone and silhouette with intention.
idealFor: Texture refinement, contour support, post-event reset

name: Gift Voucher S$100
description: A giftable credit for someone who wants to choose their own Beauskin treatment, schedule, and experience level.
tagline: A polished beauty gift with flexible redemption in clinic.
